headline: Cathie Wood Adds 48K Shares to This Under-the-Radar Growth Play
summary: Wood trimmed stakes in Nvidia, Meta, and Tesla; instead, she added this speculative biotech play.

headline: Oil Tumbles, Nasdaq 100 Jumps 3% As Iran Says It's Ready To Halt Hostilities: 10 Stocks Moving
summary: WTI crude oil fell 2% after Iran's President signaled readiness to end war. Nasdaq QQQ surged 3.2% and VIX dropped 14.4%. Airlines and growth stocks led gains.
